members.name: Alex Chen
members.bio: Specializes in PID control and odometry. Alex architected the Nexus motion library and Cybercore framework.

members.name: Sarah Miller
members.bio: Expert in mechanical efficiency and CAD design. Sarah manages the iterative build process for the Pegasus chassis.

members.name: David Park
members.bio: Known for precise maneuvering and calm under pressure. David has over 3 years of competitive driving experience.

members.name: Maya Gupta
members.bio: Maintains our award-winning engineering notebook. Maya ensures every design decision is documented and data-driven.

members.name: Leo Rodriguez
members.bio: Analyzes opponent strategies and field data. Leo provides critical insights during alliance selection.

news.title: State Championship Bound!
news.description: After a grueling series of matches, Pegasus Prime has secured a spot in the State Championships with a first-place finish.

news.title: Nexus Library v2.0 Released
news.description: Our custom motion control library now supports multi-threaded sensor fusion for even greater autonomous precision.

news.title: STEM Outreach Workshop
news.description: We hosted a robotics workshop for local middle schoolers, introducing them to the world of VEX and engineering.
